programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programs.title: Spring In Park Lane
programs.desc: A diamond merchant's niece falls for a footman who just happens to be an impoverished lord in disguise.

programs.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programs.sub_title: A Rail-y Big Problem in a Loft
programs.desc: Irita Marriott supports a grieving daughter as she parts with a train-set that belonged to her late father. She then sorts through a 30-year-old collection.

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Experts invite members of the public to bring along their antiques for examination. The team visit De Montfort Hall in Leicester, and things take a theatrical turn. Items include some antique TV footage and a poster that's a painting.

programs.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programs.desc: To the vicar's dismay, Hyacinth has volunteered to befriend a small group of senior citizens on a day at the seaside. When one of them gets too friendly, she realizes she has taken on more than she can handle.

programs.title: Midsomer Murders
programs.desc: Controversial plans to build a supermarket in Elverton-cum-Latterly lead to murder when a man is stabbed to death and the pollution advisor for the site seems to be spending more time with the women of the village than at work. Can Barnaby and Jones discover the truth and learn what is really polluting Elverton?
